en.title: Web Development Company in Dubai | AVPdev Agency
en.description: Elite web development in Dubai, UAE. We deliver state-of-the-art corporate websites, real estate portals, and startup MVPs for the Middle East.
en.h1: Elite Web Engineering for Dubai's World-Class Business Ecosystem
en.p: AVPdev builds luxury-grade Next.js platforms and intelligent automation for Dubai's finance, real estate, and enterprise sectors.

benefits.title: Luxury Digital aesthetic
benefits.desc: We deliver ultra-premium UI/UX design tailored to the high expectations of UAE customers and investors.

benefits.title: Full Bilingual Support (RTL)
benefits.desc: Our architectures natively support complex English to Arabic layout flipping (Right-to-Left) with zero performance drops.

faq.q: What is the cost of web development in Dubai?
faq.a: Pricing starts from $250 for Astro landing pages and $300 for Next.js websites. Custom web applications start from $750.
Astro landing pages take 7–14 days. Full Next.js websites take 2–4 weeks, and complex custom systems take 4–12 weeks.

faq.q: Do you develop Telegram bots and Mini Apps?
faq.a: Yes, we build intelligent bots for business automation. Prices start from $50 depending on the requirements.
Yes, we offer 12 months of technical support after launch, including bug fixes, uptime monitoring, and consultations.

faq.q: What tech stack do you use?
faq.a: We specialize in Next.js, React, Node.js, and Astro. This stack ensures the best performance, scalability, and SEO results.
